headline: Is It Time To Reassess Deere (DE) After Its Strong Year To Date Rally?
summary: If you are wondering whether Deere's current share price lines up with its underlying value, this article walks through what the numbers are really saying without the hype. The stock last closed at US$579.25, with returns of 9.5% over the past week, 0.3% over the past month, 24.1% year to date, 14.4% over 1 year, 61.6% over 3 years and 73.5% over 5 years. These figures give you several entry points to think about how the price links to fundamentals. Recent news coverage has focused on...
